# This directory holds Gmail OAuth credentials (never committed to git).
# 
# Required files:
#   gmail_credentials.json  — download from Google Cloud Console (OAuth 2.0 Client ID)
#   token.json              — auto-generated on first Gmail authentication run
#
# Setup steps:
#   1. Go to https://console.cloud.google.com/
#   2. Create a project → Enable Gmail API
#   3. Create OAuth 2.0 credentials (Desktop app)
#   4. Download and save as: credentials/gmail_credentials.json
#   5. Run: python scripts/setup_db.py  (triggers OAuth flow on first run)
